title: clercia dispansa
intro: Clercia dispansa, also known as the Queensland Maple or Quinine Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clercia dispansa include its ability to treat fever, malaria, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. In herbal preparations, Clercia dispansa is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its bark is also used to make a medicinal extract.
